business_objective.summary: A dental equipment distributor in Texas needed to expand their client base by booking consultation meetings with dental practice owners and office managers who make purchasing decisions for equipment and consumables.
business_objective.goal: Dental clinics across Texas to book consultation meetings with practice owners and office managers.

target_profile.geographic_scope: Texas metropolitan areas: Dallas, Houston, Austin, San Antonio

communication_flow: Verified dental clinic list created (practice type, location-based)
Decision-maker roles identified (practice owners, office managers, administrators)
Location + persona targeted visibility (role-specific messaging for practice owners vs office managers)
Platform expansion (LinkedIn for B2B, Facebook/Instagram for local reach)
Direct outreach escalation (consultation offer emails, follow-up phone calls)

list_size.note: Verified dental practices with contact information

decision_maker_coverage.note: Percentage of practices with identified decision-makers

meeting_requests.note: Consultation meeting requests from practice owners and office managers

timeframe_days.note: Time from campaign start to first consultation bookings

notes: Sales-level detail. More specific than public cases. Used in sales conversations for healthcare sector prospects.
